figures_detected.description: Oil pan bolt tightening sequence diagram showing numbered bolt positions (1 through 12) viewed from below
Cross-section illustration of oil pan showing washer fitment position on drain plug flange

steps.text: Attaching should be done within 5 minutes after applying liquid gasket.
notes: Attaching should be done within 5 minutes after applying liquid gasket.

steps.text: Install oil pan. Tighten bolts in sequence as shown.
notes: Tighten bolts in sequence as shown.

steps.text: Always fit a new washer to the drain plug. Fit the washer as shown in the illustration.
notes: Always fit a new washer to the drain plug. Fit the washer as shown in the illustration.

steps.text: Wait at least 30 minutes before refilling engine oil.
notes: Wait at least 30 minutes before refilling engine oil.
